prompt: Preciso montar um notebook de estudo aprofundado sobre TIPS (Transjugular Intrahepatic Portosystemic Shunt) -- indicacoes, contraindicacoes, e o impacto na sobrevida. Pipeline completo: 1) Criar notebook 'TIPS Deep Dive' 2) Rodar deep research para encontrar fontes atuais (guidelines + trials) 3) Importar as fontes encontradas 4) Gerar Study Guide report 5) Query: 'Quais as contraindicacoes absolutas vs relativas do TIPS segundo AASLD?' 6) Gerar audio debate format pra ouvir

assertions.text: Uses research start with --mode deep AND --notebook-id flag (mandatory)
Polls research status or waits before attempting import (proper sequencing)
Imports research results with research import command
Generates report with --format "Study Guide" (exact string with capital S and G and space)
Uses notebook query (NOT chat start) for the clinical question
Checks studio status between generation requests
Does NOT hallucinate nlm commands that do not exist in v0.5.1
